_comment: DEV/TESTING ONLY login credentials for the SRIM web build. These unlock a LOCAL test-login bypass in apps/daemon/src/test-login.ts and are NOT real NetBird credentials. The backend ignores this file in production (NODE_ENV=production) or when ACCOMPLISH_DISABLE_TEST_LOGIN=1. Override via env: ACCOMPLISH_TEST_LOGIN_TOKEN / ACCOMPLISH_TEST_LOGIN_USER / ACCOMPLISH_TEST_LOGIN_PASS.
